prompt: A hyper-detailed anime-style illustration of a rugged middle-aged man at a wild tropical dance party, shown from a dramatic low angle with the camera close to his torso. He has an extremely muscular, bodybuilder physique with sharply defined abs, broad chest, visible sweat droplets glistening across his skin, a slightly hairy jawline and neck, and messy short light-brown hair. His face is mostly out of frame or obscured, keeping the focus on his physique and action. He wears an open bright floral Hawaiian shirt with large multicolored hibiscus flowers, no undershirt, and a gold chain necklace with a round pendant. In both hands he is shaking 2 large maracas, one thrust toward the viewer on the left foreground and one on the right side, each striped in red, yellow, green, and black, with strong motion blur to show energetic movement. The background is a packed nightclub or festival crowd with raised hands, neon laser beams, fireworks-like bursts of light, colorful bokeh, and falling confetti pieces everywhere. Use an explosive palette of magenta, purple, blue, gold, green, and hot pink, with glossy highlights, intense rim lighting, exaggerated perspective, dynamic foreshortening, and a celebratory, over-the-top party atmosphere. Make it look like high-end polished anime key art with crisp linework, dramatic shading, sparkling effects, and maximum energy.
